introSection: Batman The Ride is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Batman The Ride was originally painted yellow with blue supports. For the 2015 season, the ride was repainted and the supports were changed to a grey colour.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and grey supports, used to have blue supports.

fullText:
Batman The Ride is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico.

Batman The Ride was originally painted yellow with blue supports. For the 2015 season, the ride was repainted and the supports were changed to a grey colour.

Yellow track and grey supports, used to have blue supports.
